name: Dice Roller
description: Roll virtual dice for games and decision making.
keywords: dice roller, virtual dice, roll dice online, random dice, d20 roller, board game dice
howToUse: 1. Select dice type (d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20, d100) 2. Choose count 3. Click Roll 4. See result
faq: Q: Is it random? A: Yes, truly random. Q: Multiple dice? A: Yes, up to 20 dice.
